name: python3-legacy-cgi
title: python3-legacy-cgi
summary: fork of the standard library cgi and cgitb modules
description:
fork of the standard library cgi and cgitb modules
This package provides a fork of the standard library modules cgi and cgitb.
They are slated, and were removed from the Python standard libary in Python
3.13 by PEP-594.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-legacy-cgi because fork of the standard library cgi and cgitb modules.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-legacy-cgi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-legacy-cgi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-legacy-cgi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
